# Instructions for CSS

Always follow the patterns defined in:

- src/styles/variables.css
- src/styles/globals.css

When writing CSS:

- Never invent new colors.
- Always use the existing CSS variables.
- Never use hexadecimal values directly, unless requested.
- Respect the existing spacing system.
- Use the defined border-radius tokens.
- Use only the typography defined in globals.css.
- Do not create new breakpoints.
